generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
namespace base = "http://example.org/base"
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance PressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PressureSensor
]
instance VibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VibrationSensor
]
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring temperature parameters from the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance PressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring pressure parameters from the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PressureDataTransmitted
]
instance VibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vibration parameters from the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VibrationDataTransmitted
]
instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified safety violations detected during monitoring"
]
instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational efficiency through real-time data"
]
instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of Physical Twin under current conditions"
]
instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomalies identified by fault detection algorithms"
]
instance AccurateStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Precise determination of system state for decision-making"
]
instance OptimalOperationalParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameters for maintaining system integrity and efficiency"
]
instance AutomatedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated modification of Physical Twin operations based on system violations",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ManualAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human-initiated modification of Physical Twin operations based on system violations",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data analysis for safety and operational efficiency monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight, AutomatedAdjustmentAction, ManualAdjustmentAction
]
instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations to reproduce and forecast physical twin behavior under current conditions",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms identifying anomalies in system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]
instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Precise system state determination using sensor data and models",
    DTDFVocab:provides AccurateStateEstimationInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization capabilities via optimisers and supervisory controllers for operational efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalOperationalParametersInsight
]
instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for updating model parameters using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService
]
instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for precise system state determination using sensor data and models",
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]
instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for identifying anomalies in system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing operational efficiency via supervisory controllers",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for predictive simulations to reproduce and forecast physical twin behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]
instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for real-time data analysis to assess safety and operational efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]
instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation used for simulation and monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]
instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling dynamic behavior for state estimation and optimization",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, Optimizer
]
instance CyberModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic model for system regulation and optimization",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Optimizer, CalibrationAlgorithm
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from Physical Twin sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator
]
instance PressureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time pressure measurements from Physical Twin sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PressureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, Optimizer
]
instance VibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vibration measurements from Physical Twin sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VibrationDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs calibration algorithms to update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models with parameter estimates derived from sensor data, which informs monitoring systems for safety and optimization checks; detected violations prompt human or algorithmic adjustments to the Physical Twin."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle integrates design-phase Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models for geometric specifications and analysis-phase dynamic models using differential equations for physical behavior simulation. Upon system deployment, these models are maintained and integrated into the Digital Twin framework to support ongoing monitoring, simulation, and optimization of the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update model parameters using real-time sensor data to maintain fidelity with the Physical Twin. Monitoring systems validate system performance against safety and optimality criteria, with detected violations prompting corrective actions through human or algorithmic interventions."
]
